tasks.subject: Task 0: appSettings keys (4 typed accessors)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add typed getter/setter helpers for the 4 new settings consumed by every other task.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/storage/appSettings.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/appSettings-terminalHistory.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- appSettings-terminalHistory --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/storage/appSettings.ts", "app/tests/unit/appSettings-terminalHistory.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- appSettings-terminalHistory --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defaults: desktop=true, mobile=false, blocklist=10-item canonical, banner=false", "setters round-trip", "corrupted stored array falls back to defaults"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: parseTerminalNote — accept optional history section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend parser to recognize `history:` paragraph + bulletList. Return `history: string[]` on the spec.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/parseTerminalNote.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/parseTerminalNote.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- parseTerminalNote --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/parseTerminalNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/parseTerminalNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- parseTerminalNote --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["existing tests pass with history:[] added", "8 new history-recognition tests pass", "header w/o list returns empty history", "free paragraph after history list returns null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TerminalWsClient.sendCommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `sendCommand(text, autoExecute)` re-input helper.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/wsClient.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/wsClientSendCommand.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- wsClientSendCommand --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/wsClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/wsClientSendCommand.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- wsClientSendCommand --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sendCommand without CR", "sendCommand with CR", "no-op when ws closed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: historyStore — read-modify-write with debounce
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `historyStore.ts` with append/remove/clear + 500ms debounce per-guid + serialized chain. Pure helpers exported for tests.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/historyStore.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/historyStore.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- historyStore --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/historyStore.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/historyStore.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- historyStore --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["move-to-top dedup", "cap 50 FIFO", "silent ABORT on non-terminal note", "creates history: section if absent", "notifyNoteSaved + emitNoteReload after write", "500ms debounce coalesces", "flushTerminalHistoryNow flushes immediately", "whitespace-prefix rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: OSC 133 capture + command extraction
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hook xterm OSC parser. On ;C, scrape buffer, sanitize, filter, dispatch to historyStore.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/oscCapture.ts`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte`
- Modify (callers add `guid` prop): `app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte`, `app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/oscCapture.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- oscCapture --run && cd app && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/oscCapture.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte", "app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/tests/unit/editor/oscCapture.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- oscCapture --run && cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helper tests pass", "OSC handler returns true (no render)", "both callers pass guid prop", "shellIntegrationDetected flips on first OSC"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: HistoryPanel + TerminalView UI integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render panel; toggle button; desktop=240px right column (default open), mobile=bottom sheet (default closed). Click=stage, Shift+click=execute. Long-press/right-click menu. 30s shell-integration banner.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/HistoryPanel.svelte`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check` && manual smoke test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/HistoryPanel.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggle persists per platform", "click/Shift+click correct", "long-press 500ms with vibrate", "banner shows after 30s if undetected", "banner dismiss persists", "subscribes noteReloadBus"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Settings — new "터미널" tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New tab between 동기화 설정 and 알림. Move bridge UI here. Add 명령어 히스토리 + 셸 통합 + 보안 sections.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check` && manual `/settings` test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tab type extended", "tabs order sync/config/terminal/notify/advanced", "bridge UI moved verbatim (h2→브릿지 연결)", "history checkboxes + blocklist textarea + reset", "snippet code block + 복사 button", "보안 안내 section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CLAUDE.md & tomboy-terminal skill update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reflect format extension + invariants in CLAUDE.md and tomboy-terminal skill file.

**Files:**
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`
- Modify: tomboy-terminal SKILL.md (path resolved at start)

**Verify:** `grep -n 'OSC 133' CLAUDE.md && grep -n 'history:' CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'OSC 133' CLAUDE.md && grep -n 'history:' CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["body invariant updated for optional history", "6 new invariants added from spec §7", "quick map lists historyStore.ts/oscCapture.ts/HistoryPanel.svelte", "skill file mirrors changes"]}
```
